uplink.description: combined telemetry: air temperature, humidity, CO2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload built from three 7-byte S210x telemetry frames (ids 4097/4098/4100) + 2 CRC bytes. Expected telemetry produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js: measurementValue 22.5 / 55.3 / 612; normalized by measurement id onto air.temperature/relativeHumidity/co2.

uplink.description: negative temperature with high humidity and elevated CO2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising two's-complement negative air temperature. reference/upstream-codec.js yields measurementValue -8.4 / 91.2 / 1450.
Synthetic single S210x telemetry frame (id 4100) + 2 CRC bytes. reference/upstream-codec.js yields measurementValue 800 (raw 800000 / 1000); normalized to air.co2.

uplink.description: device properties: version, battery percent, reporting interval, remove-sensor
uplink._note: Upstream example input (TTN sensecap210x-codec.yaml example 1). reference/upstream-codec.js emits upload_battery.battery=100 and upload_interval.interval=3600 (seconds); battery percent -> batteryPercent extra (vocabulary battery is volts), interval seconds -> reportingInterval extra. Version and remove-sensor frames carry no field measurement.
Synthetic 7-byte payload missing the 2 trailing CRC bytes; (7 - 2) % 7 = 5 != 0. reference/upstream-codec.js sets err=-2 (length check fail); our codec returns an errors array.
